Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Gardeners]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 2''' — Yala is currently using two Gardeners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 3''' — Kerian wondered if Maxwell was imitating the Gardeners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Gardeners are trained to avoid armed conflict.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Gardeners are a group that the public is told does not exist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — The original order of Gardeners provided strategic advice regarding Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — The shears of the Gardeners are not designed to hold their own against a sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 9''' — The purpose of Gardeners is to maintain balance in the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — The Gardeners worked in secret for most of Meia's life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Gardeners spread Nakothi's influence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 18''' — There are three Gardeners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — Gardeners is a group or discipline Lucan studied.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 20''' — There are three Gardeners traveling with the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 27''' — Gardeners are a group that could be sent to depopulate The Testament.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — Kern mentions the existence of Gardeners as a group to fight against.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Gardeners are a group that can be recognized by those in the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 3''' — The Gardeners are a guild that is sparsely populated.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 3''' — The Gardeners remove weeds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Gardeners wear standard-issue blacks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Gardeners are a group mentioned in comparison to Shera's value.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — The Gardeners include Meia and Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — The Gardeners are a group that follows commands from an unnamed leader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — The Gardeners are a group that Ayana was an instructor in.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Gardeners remove threats to their Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 10''' — Gardeners wear black clothing known as Gardener blacks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 12''' — Gardeners are trained by the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — Gardeners are a squad within the Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 14''' — Shera, Meia, and Lucan are Gardeners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — The Readers inspected imitation Gardeners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — The Gardeners are a group that performs pruning work decided by the Council.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — The Gardeners are a group that has been acting against Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Gardeners are a group that might have stabbed the Steward.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — The Gardeners are an order of Consultant that uses skintight black silks as symbols.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Gardeners are a group that Shera has 'baby' or imitation members of.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — The Gardeners are a guild that some Consultants have opinions about.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Only fifteen sets of true Gardener shears remain in the Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — The fifteen most senior Gardeners are awarded shears.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Gardeners typically retire or move to the Architects by fifty.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Gardeners are a group that Shera does not trust plans as much as.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Gardeners are a group that Shera is associated with and who attempt to assassinate certain Champions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — A handful of Gardeners infiltrated the crowd with Shera and Jorin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 19''' — The Emperor's personal Gardeners were the only ones who knew the full details of the events in his chambers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — The Gardeners are present at Shera's meeting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Shera had sent Gardeners to spread out among the city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — The Gardeners are a group led by Guild Head Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Shera calls upon the Gardeners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — Some Gardeners carry glowing shears.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
